summary: Comprehensive testing of i18n Italian translations and admin badge bug fix. All frontend pages fully translated to Italian. Language toggle (EN|IT) works instantly without page reload. Admin badge system correctly shows 0 after marking sections as read.

Landing Page Italian Translation.details: Nav: Funzionalità, Sicurezza, Chi siamo, Registrati. Hero: Crea Portafoglio, Accedi al Portafoglio. Stats: Portafogli Creati, Transazioni Elaborate, Paesi Supportati, Fondazione. Footer fully translated.

Login Page Italian Translation.details: Title: 'Accedi a Blockchain.com', Button: 'Accedi', Text: 'Non hai un account? Registrati', Back link: 'Indietro'

Wallet Dashboard Italian Translation.details: Header: Portafoglio. Actions: Scambia, Invia, Deposita, Preleva. Sections: Asset, Vedi tutto, Esci. Account labels: Nome Utente, Indirizzo ETH, Stato KYC. Available balance: 'Disponibile'

Transactions Page Italian Translation.details: Header: Transazioni. Filter buttons: Tutte, Depositi, Ricevute, Invii, Scambi. Transaction types: Deposito, Ricezione, Invio, Scambio. Status: Completata. Italian date format: '27 feb 2026'

Profile Page Italian Translation.details: Header: Profilo. Sections: Verifica Identità (Non Verificato, Verifica Ora), Informazioni Personali (Email, Numero di Telefono, Data di Nascita, Nome Utente), Portafoglio e Sicurezza (Indirizzo Portafoglio ETH, Stato Account, Membro Dal). Buttons: Cambia Password, Esci

Language Toggle EN|IT (No Page Reload).details: Language toggle button on Landing, Login, and Wallet pages switches between EN and IT instantly without page reload using React context (LangProvider)

Admin Badge System Fix.details: GET /api/admin/badges returns correct badge counts. PUT /api/admin/badges/{section}/mark-read sets count to 0. Badge stays at 0 on subsequent fetches (no stuck '1' issue). _strip_tz() function normalizes ISO timestamps for consistent MongoDB comparison.

Admin Preview Banner.details: WalletDashboard shows admin preview banner when isAdmin=true. 'Back to Admin Panel' button navigates back to /admin. Uses data-testid='admin-preview-banner' and data-testid='back-to-admin-btn'

Backend Email Italian Templates.details: All email templates have Italian versions: KYC verification, KYC approved, password reset, reactivation, fee payment, fee resolution, welcome, transaction notification. Templates selected based on user's preferred_language field.

Language Preference API.details: PUT /api/auth/language?lang=it updates user's preferred_language. Invalid language codes default to 'en'.

mocked_apis.note: All financial data is admin-controlled/simulated. No real blockchain or banking integrations.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full i18n implementation verified. Italian translations complete across all user-facing pages (Landing, Login, Register, Wallet Dashboard, Transactions, Profile, KYC). Language toggle uses React context (LangProvider from i18n.js). Admin badge fix uses _strip_tz() to normalize ISO timestamps. Email service supports Italian via lang parameter. Test user: testdesktop@example.com with 4 transactions (deposit, send, swap, receive).
